product_overview: EDQ is an automated network security testing platform that discovers, scans, and qualifies IP devices in smart buildings, providing test execution, real-time run output, device comparison, and exportable compliance reports.
core_goals: Discover and inventory networked smart-building devices
Run automated security and compliance test plans against devices and view live test output
Manage devices and projects, and compare device security posture over time
Generate and export audit-quality reports (PDF/DOCX/XLSX/CSV) and maintain audit logs
Operate and monitor remote agents and view real-time terminal output for test runs

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.description: Allow users to sign in, maintain a secure session, and access role-controlled parts of the application.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See validation error about credentials

features.name: Dashboard & Trends
features.description: Provide a single-pane overview of device inventory, recent test runs, activity, and trend charts for device history.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See summary counts for devices, projects, and recent test runs -> See trend charts for device history
Navigate to / -> Apply a time range filter -> See updated trend charts and recent activity

features.name: Device Management
features.description: Inventory devices, add or edit device details, fingerprint devices, and manage device profiles and authorized networks.
user_flows: Navigate to /devices -> Start add device flow -> Provide device details -> Save device -> See device listed in inventory
Navigate to /devices -> Select a device from the list -> See device details including fingerprint and history
Navigate to /device-profiles -> Create or edit a device profile -> Save profile -> See profile listed

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Create and manage projects to group devices and organize test plans and reporting by project.
user_flows: Navigate to /projects -> Start create project -> Provide project name and metadata -> Save project -> See project in project list
Navigate to /projects -> Open a project -> Assign devices to the project -> See assigned devices listed under the project

features.name: Test Runs & Live Execution
features.description: Create and run test plans/templates against devices and watch real-time test output streaming from the test engine.
user_flows: Navigate to /test-runs -> Start a new test run using a template -> Select target devices -> Start run -> See live output stream for the running test
Navigate to /test-runs -> Select a completed test run from the list -> See summarized results and parsed findings

features.name: Network Scanning & Discovery
features.description: Perform network discovery and port/service scanning to discover devices and collect service fingerprints and OS information.
user_flows: Navigate to /network-scan -> Start discovery scan for an IP range -> See list of discovered devices and open ports -> Add selected discovered device to inventory

features.name: Reporting & Export
features.description: Generate configurable reports and export data in multiple formats (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV) for audits and compliance.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Create a new report -> Select scope, format, and options -> Generate report -> Download generated report file
Navigate to /audit-log -> Apply filters -> Export CSV -> Download CSV

features.name: Device Comparison
features.description: Compare two or more devices to highlight configuration and vulnerability differences over time.
user_flows: Navigate to /devices/compare -> Select devices to compare -> Run comparison -> See side-by-side differences and risk summary

features.name: Agents & Real-time Terminal
features.description: Register and monitor remote agents, view agent heartbeat status, and stream real-time terminal output during remote runs.
user_flows: Navigate to /agents -> Register a new agent by providing agent metadata -> See agent listed with heartbeat status
Navigate to /agents -> Select an agent -> Start a remote test run on the agent -> See live terminal output from the agent

features.name: Administration & Audit Logging
features.description: Admin users can manage accounts, roles, whitelists, and review audit logs for system activity and compliance.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Create a new user account -> Assign a role -> Save user -> See new user in the user list
Navigate to /audit-log -> Apply filters -> Select a log entry -> See detailed audit entry -> Export CSV of filtered logs

features.name: Test Templates & Plans
features.description: Create and manage test templates and plans that define sets of tools and checks to run against device targets.
user_flows: Navigate to /templates -> Create a new test template -> Define tools and checks -> Save template -> See template in list
Navigate to /test-plans -> Create a test plan using an existing template -> Save plan -> See plan listed

features.name: Whitelists & Authorized Networks
features.description: Manage protocol/service whitelists and authorized network ranges to control scanning scope and false-positive suppression.
user_flows: Navigate to /whitelists -> Add a whitelist entry -> Provide rule details -> Save entry -> See whitelist entry applied
Navigate to /authorized-networks -> Add an authorized network range -> Save range -> See range listed

project.name: EDQ - Electracom Device Qualifier
project.description: Automated network security testing platform for smart building IP devices

features: JWT-based authentication with CSRF protection and 2FA support
Role-based access control (admin, reviewer, standard user)
Real-time test run output via WebSocket (xterm.js LiveTerminal)
CSV export for reports and audit logs
Sentry error monitoring and frontend telemetry
Recharts-based trend charting for device history
Error boundary with per-page and global fallbacks
JWT session cookies with httpOnly + SameSite + Secure flags
Two-factor authentication (TOTP via pyotp + QR code)
Security headers middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
Async SQLAlchemy with asyncpg (PostgreSQL) and aiosqlite (SQLite fallback)
Orphaned test run recovery on startup
Test engine with tool parsers (nmap, testssl, ssh-audit, hydra, Nessus)
Report generation (PDF via fpdf2, DOCX via python-docx, XLSX via openpyxl)
Sentry error monitoring (server-side + frontend error relay)
Structured logging with per-request context binding
Admin user seeding on first boot

services.name: backend
services.capabilities: NET_ADMIN, NET_RAW (required for nmap raw socket scans)
